member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.BrandDocumentFragment
member.summary: Represents a reusable brand document fragment (header or footer) that can be injected into generated documents like business plans, company letters, and menus.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.BrandDocumentFragment.FragmentType
member.summary: Type of fragment: "header" or "footer"

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.BrandDocumentFragment.DocumentType
member.summary: Document type this fragment is designed for: "company-letter", "business-plan", "menu"

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.BrandDocumentFragment.Layout
member.summary: Layout definition for the fragment structure

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.BrandDocumentFragment.Slots
member.summary: Content slots containing the actual values for the fragment Key is the slot identifier (e.g., "company-name", "address", "phone")

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.BrandDocumentFragment.Styling
member.summary: Brand styling tokens applied to this fragment

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.BrandDocumentFragment.Feedback
member.summary: AI rationale for design decisions made during generation

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.BrandDocumentFragment.Metadata
member.summary: Metadata about the fragment's generation and dependencies

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.BrandDocumentFragment.BaseImageUrl
member.summary: URL to the generated base image (background with logo, before text overlays)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.BrandDocumentFragment.FinalImageUrl
member.summary: URL to the final generated image (with all text overlays applied)

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentLayout
member.summary: Defines the visual structure and element placement of a fragment

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentLayout.Structure
member.summary: Layout structure type: "row", "column", "grid"

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentLayout.Alignment
member.summary: Content alignment: "left", "center", "right", "space-between"

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentLayout.Elements
member.summary: Ordered list of layout elements defining the visual structure

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.LayoutElement
member.summary: Individual element within a fragment layout

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.LayoutElement.Type
member.summary: Element type: "logo", "text", "divider", "spacer", "slot"

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.LayoutElement.SlotId
member.summary: If Type="slot", references a key in the Slots dictionary

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.LayoutElement.Position
member.summary: Position within the layout: "left", "center", "right"

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.LayoutElement.Size
member.summary: Size specification: "small", "medium", "large", or specific dimensions

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.LayoutElement.Style
member.summary: Additional inline styling for this element

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentSlot
member.summary: A content slot within a fragment that can hold editable or generated values

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentSlot.Value
member.summary: Current value of the slot

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentSlot.Source
member.summary: Source of the value: "gathered", "generated", "brand", "user" - gathered: From gathered-data store (phone, address, etc.) - generated: AI-generated content - brand: Derived from brand profile/assets - user: Manually edited by user

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentSlot.Editable
member.summary: Whether the user can modify this slot value

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentSlot.Generatable
member.summary: Whether AI can regenerate this slot. False for factual data like phone/address

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentSlot.Label
member.summary: Display label for the editing UI

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentSlot.GatheredDataKey
member.summary: If Source="gathered", the key to look up in gathered-data store

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentStyling
member.summary: Brand styling tokens applied to a fragment

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentStyling.PrimaryColor
member.summary: Primary brand color (hex)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentStyling.SecondaryColor
member.summary: Secondary brand color (hex)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentStyling.BackgroundColor
member.summary: Background color (hex)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentStyling.FontFamily
member.summary: Font family name

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentStyling.FontSize
member.summary: Font size specification

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentStyling.LogoUrl
member.summary: URL or base64 of the brand logo

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentMetadata
member.summary: Metadata about fragment generation and dependencies

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentMetadata.GeneratedAt
member.summary: When the fragment was first generated

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentMetadata.UpdatedAt
member.summary: When the fragment was last updated

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentMetadata.Version
member.summary: Version number for tracking changes

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentMetadata.Dependencies
member.summary: List of brand asset dependencies (e.g., "logo", "color-scheme") Used to suggest regeneration when dependencies change

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentMetadata.NeedsRegeneration
member.summary: Whether this fragment needs regeneration due to brand asset changes

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.FragmentMetadata.RegenerationReason
member.summary: Reason why regeneration is suggested

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.ColorScheme
member.summary: Color scheme configuration for brand visual identity. Contains primary, secondary, accent, and other brand colors.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.HazinaMessageRole
member.summary: Represents the role of a message sender in a chat conversation

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.HazinaChatMessage
member.summary: Represents a chat message with role and content

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.HazinaChatMessage.Role
member.summary: Gets or sets the role of the message sender.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.HazinaChatMessage.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the content of the message.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Models.HazinaChatMessage.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the HazinaChatMessage class.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Models.HazinaChatMessage.#ctor(Hazina.Tools.Models.HazinaMessageRole,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the HazinaChatMessage class with the specified role and content.
member.param: The role of the message sender.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.ImageVariant.Prompt
member.summary: Internal prompt used to generate this image. Marked as JsonIgnore to prevent leaking to clients.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Models.ImageSet.Title
member.summary: Internal base prompt used for generation. Marked as JsonIgnore to prevent leaking to clients.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.Social.FlexibleCommentsConverter
member.summary: JSON converter that handles Comments field in both formats: - Integer: "Comments": 0 → empty list - Array: "Comments": [{...}] → keeps as-is

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.Social.FlexibleReactionsConverter
T:Hazina.Tools.Models.TokenUsage
member.summary: Represents token usage for a project on a specific date

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.TokenUsageSummary
member.summary: Aggregated token usage for reporting

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.Typography
member.summary: Typography configuration for brand visual identity. Contains font pairings for different text roles (headings, body, accent, etc.).

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Models.WordPressCredentials
member.summary: Struct to store WordPress credential information.

member.name: T:BlogCategory
member.summary: Model dat wordt gebruikt voor het structureren en opslaan van blogcategorieën in de applicatie.

member.name: P:BlogCategory.Id
member.summary: Unieke identificatie voor de categorie.

member.name: P:BlogCategory.Title
member.summary: Naam van de blogcategorie.

member.name: P:BlogCategory.Description
member.summary: Korte omschrijving van de blogcategorie.

member.name: P:BlogCategory.Enabled
member.summary: Whether this category is enabled for blog generation.

member.name: T:BlogCategoryList
member.summary: Een lijst van blogcategorieën.
